# Context Manager

Manages conversation context and history for the AI Terminal Assistant.

## Features

- Message tracking and history management
- Token estimation and context window management
- Session persistence and restoration
- File context tracking

## Usage

```javascript
const ContextManager = require('./ContextManager');

// Create a context manager with 4096 token limit
const context = new ContextManager(4096);

// Add messages
context.addMessage('user', 'Hello, can you help me?');
context.addMessage('assistant', 'Of course! How can I assist you?');

// Get all messages
const messages = context.getMessages();

// Get filtered messages
const userMessages = context.getMessages({ role: 'user' });
const lastFive = context.getMessages({ limit: 5 });

// Clear context
context.clear();
```
